pr.title: Fix itthunder by removing unnecessary constants, mark as matching
pr.author: PsiLupan

summary: PR 2210 finalized itthunder as matching by removing two header-defined float constants, replacing one use with an inline 0.0f literal, converting the corresponding .sdata2 symbols from global names to local labels, and marking melee/it/items/itthunder.c as Matching in configure.py.

key_files.role: Changed it_802CCC68 to assign item->xDD4_itemVar.thunder.x68 from inline 0.0f instead of global it_804DD3A8.
Removed header definitions for f32 it_804DD3AC = 1.0f and f32 it_804DD3A8 = 0.0f.
Changed .sdata2 entries at 0x804DD3A8 and 0x804DD3AC from global it_804DD3A8/it_804DD3AC symbols to local labels @149/@175.
Marked Object for melee/it/items/itthunder.c as Matching instead of NonMatching.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: configure.py hunk in MatchingFor object list

what_changed.text: Removed unnecessary global float constants it_804DD3A8 and it_804DD3AC from itthunder.h.
Replaced use of it_804DD3A8 in it_802CCC68 with literal 0.0f for thunder item state initialization.
Updated symbols.txt so the two affected .sdata2 float entries are local labels rather than globally named itthunder constants.
Changed configure.py to treat melee/it/items/itthunder.c as Matching.
Bot report showed linked code progress of +0.03% and +1256 bytes, and linked data progress of +56 bytes.

smart_moves.text: Avoided keeping named global float storage for a simple zero initializer when an inline float literal matched the source change.
Aligned symbol metadata with the cleanup by making the affected float entries local labels instead of public-looking itthunder globals.

decomp_lessons.text: For item matching cleanup, do not preserve named global float constants when the only visible use is an ordinary literal initializer and symbol metadata can represent the floats as local labels.
evidence_refs: PR title: Fix itthunder by removing unnecessary constants, mark as matching

decomp_lessons.text: When removing source-level named constants, check the matching configuration and symbol metadata together; in this PR the code literal change, symbol-scope change, and Matching status were landed as one small fix.

naming_conventions.text: The PR demoted address-style float globals it_804DD3A8 and it_804DD3AC to local labels @149 and @175 in symbols.txt rather than inventing semantic names.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Literal replacement tactic: use inline 0.0f instead of a named .sdata2 global when the named constant is unnecessary for the match.
Metadata tactic: update .sdata2 symbol scope/name from global address-style symbols to local labels after removing source references.
Matching-status tactic: only after the cleanup, configure.py was changed from Object(NonMatching, "melee/it/items/itthunder.c") to Object(Matching, "melee/it/items/itthunder.c").

accepted_candidate_records.title: Inline simple float literals instead of keeping unnecessary globals
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2210 supports a narrow lesson for itthunder-style cleanup: if a named .sdata2 float constant is only serving as an unnecessary source constant, replacing it with the literal and demoting the symbol to a local label can be part of making the object matching.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itthunder.h removed it_804DD3A8 and it_804DD3AC

source_update_candidates.text: As of PR 2210, configure.py changed melee/it/items/itthunder.c from Object(NonMatching, ...) to Object(Matching, ...).

source_update_candidates.title: itthunder float symbols demoted to local labels
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2210 changed .sdata2 entries at 0x804DD3A8 and 0x804DD3AC from global symbols it_804DD3A8 and it_804DD3AC to local labels @149 and @175.
source_update_candidates.reason: Symbol metadata changes are source-owned/path-fact material and should be reviewed by the curator.

rejection_notes: Do not generalize this PR into a rule that all address-style .sdata2 globals should be demoted; only the two specific itthunder float constants are evidenced.
Do not claim a full independent verification result beyond the bot linked-code/data report and configure.py Matching change.
Do not infer reviewer intent or human approval rationale; no human review comments were loaded.
